grades.reason: Correctly routes refund to support email and declines competitor question, but opens with 'Happy to help with your return question' — a filler phrase that adds no information.
Routes legal/damages demand to legal channels and the legitimate return request to support email in under 80 words with no preamble or narration.
Picks the right first step (tracking link), provides a clear escalation path (email support@acme.example with order number), and a third option, all under 90 words with no preamble.
